name: Simple AI Bot Maker V2
description:
This bot maker is specifically designed to help you create a simple bot on most AI sites, including Janitor AI. It will follow your instructions and create the bot according to your preferences. It will provide your bot's character definitions, including:

  • Name

  • Gender

  • Short Introduction

  • Introduction

  • Connection with {{user}}

  • Past Story Between {{char}} and {{user}}

  • Background

  • Personality

  • Likes

  • Dislikes

  • Kink

  • Appearance

  • Speech Styles

  • Scenario

  • Setting Of Place

  • Setting Of Time

  • Initial Message (> 25 sentences)

  • Example Dialogs

It's very simple and easy to use. You can give either full or just minimal information about the bot you want to make, and the bot maker will automatically create the rest for you. You can also ask for adjustments to the character definitions until you feel they fit.

Note from the author: You don't need to credit me whenever you publish a bot made using this bot maker. Feel free to use it as you wish.

Tags: bot creator, character creator, character maker, bot assistant, character assistant, bot helper, character helper, bot automation, character automation, ai creator, automatic bot, automatic bot maker, automatic bot creator, automatic bot assistant.
